title: Dynabeads for IP Reagent-In-Tube Part 1
author: Opentrons
materials: performs pipetting and mixing of reagents and samples on the OT2 as the first part of automated immunoprecipitation using Thermo Fisher Dynabeads Protein A or Protein G. The user can determine the number of samples to be processed. The samples (e.g. cell lysates), Dynabeads and the antibody specific for the protein of interest will be transferred to and mixed in a 96-well deepwell working plate on the OT

steps.title: The first part of the protocol...
steps.instruction: The first part of the protocol completes at this point allowing the user to move the working plate to an agitation device, an antibody/target protein incubation period determined by the user. After incubation, the process proceeds with the second part of the protocol on the OT

steps.title: Dynabeads/antibody/target protein complex will be washed,...
steps.instruction: Dynabeads/antibody/target protein complex will be washed, eluted, and heated to denature. The final product is ready for SDS-PAGE.

steps.title: Bead slurry (in a 15 mL...
steps.instruction: Bead slurry (in a 15 mL tube, slot 4) is transferred to the working plate (slot 1) by the single-channel pipet, and supernatant removed with magnetic module on.

steps.title: Antibody solution (in a 15 mL...
steps.instruction: Antibody solution (in a 15 mL tube, slot 4) is transferred to the working plate (slot 1) by the single-channel pipet.

steps.title: Samples (in 96 deepwell plate, slot...
steps.instruction: Samples (in 96 deepwell plate, slot 5) are transferred to the working plate (slot 1) by the 8-channel pipet) and mixed by pipetting up and down (10 times)

steps.title: The working plate is sealed and moved to a shaker
steps.instruction: The working plate is sealed and moved to a shaker.
